description: An agent must analyze customer data to identify the key factors that predict customer churn.

nodes.task_description: Load customer data, including demographic info, usage data, and a 'Churned' flag (Yes/No).
Run a logistic regression model to predict the 'Churned' flag based on the other variables.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully builds the predictive model.

nodes.task_description: Identify the top 3 variables with the highest coefficients in the model as the strongest predictors of churn.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the key drivers of churn (e.g., 'low usage', 'high price').
